message:
refactor(abi,membrane): improve iconv safety, fix tdelete, and add spawn attrs

ABI Improvements:
- Refactor iconv() with null-pointer checks for input/output buffers
  and improved safety guards; add UTF-32 BOM emission test
- Fix tdelete() to track parent node correctly for proper POSIX return
  value semantics (was losing parent reference)
- Remove extract_d_off() helper in dirent; use entry.d_off directly
- Fix sigset_size in poll/process ABIs: use size_of::<c_ulong>()
  instead of size_of::<sigset_t>() for kernel syscall compatibility
- Add apply_spawn_attrs() for POSIX spawn attribute handling (pgroup,
  sigmask, scheduling policy)

Membrane:
- Add metrics emission for flat_combining and RCU refresh events
- Seqlock and alien_cs_metrics refinements

Conformance:
- Update conformance lib and stdlib tests
- Refresh CVE arena test artifacts (bd-15n.2, bd-18qq.4, bd-1f35,
  bd-1qy) with current outputs

Beads:
- Update issue tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
